<p class="key-answer" data-question="Besilesomab 有什麼相關新聞？">

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Besilesomab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：This medicinal product is for diagnostic use only and the approved indication is scintigraphic imaging, in conjunction with other appropriate imaging modalities, for determining the location of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（98.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（97.9%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（97.8%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（97.7%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（97.7%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（97.4%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（95.2%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（94.8%）</li>
<li>gastric adenocarcinoma and proximal polyposis of the stomach（94.8%）</li>
<li>signet ring cell gastric adenocarcinoma（94.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
